name: ExponentialRolloutRate
description: Allows you to create an exponential rate of rollout for a job.

allOf.description: The minimum number of things that will be notified of a pending job, per minute at the start of job rollout. This parameter allows you to define the initial rate of rollout.

The exponential factor to increase the rate of rollout for a job.

Amazon Web Services IoT Core supports up to one digit after the decimal (for example, 1.5, but not 1.55).
The criteria to initiate the increase in rate of rollout for a job.
